name: lock file _locks entry includes a holder and an expires field per the contract
command: printf '{"_locks":{"rubric":{"holder":"pid-1234","expires":"2026-05-13T01:00:00Z"}}}\n' > lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-lock.sh" --lock lock.json --check locks-format 2>out.txt && grep -q 'holder=pid-1234' out.txt && grep -q 'expires=2026-05-13T01:00:00Z' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
